title: Tariffs are still +10%
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know about this week:
The US reached a business deal with the UK which alleviated pressures on steel and aluminium and promoted sales of industrial products, but 10% tariffs remained. Additionally, they reached a 90-day "pause" with China. A 10% tariff base scenario between the US and the rest of the world, is still a very adverse economic outcome, versus reality pre-2025.
